Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Oct-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Motion for an Order to Apportion and Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Yvonne Frisbie, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Lloyd Frisbie, et al.
Scott Allder, father of one on the heirs to the Estate of Michele Allder, was placed under oath and testified.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, RULES that the following are entitled to distribution of all net funds from settlements negotiated after the August 28, 2013 death of Lloyd Frisbie in the following proportions as follows:

Estate of Lloyd Frisbie - 0%.
Yvonne Frisbie - 60%.
Keith Bartholomew - 10%.
Meghan Mac-Rhyann - 10%.
Lacey Mac-Rhyann - 10%.
